keywords.job: I am the grand druid of Carlin. I am responsible for the guild, the fields, and our citizens health.
keywords.grand: I am the grand druid of Carlin. I am responsible for the guild, the fields, and our citizens health.
keywords.druid: We are druids, preservers of life. Our magic is about defense, healing, and nature.
keywords.name: I am Padreia, Grand Druid of our fine city.
keywords.time: Time is just a crystal pillar. The center of creation and life.
keywords.member: Our members wield magic powers of protection and healing.
keywords.magic: Every member of the Druids is able to learn the numerous spells of our craft.
keywords.power: Every member of the Druids is able to learn the numerous spells of our craft.
keywords.sorcerer: Sorcerers are destrucitve. Their power lies in destruction and pain.
keywords.vocation: Your vocation is your profession. There are four vocations in this world: Druids, paladins, knights, and sorcerers.
keywords.spellbook: In a spellbook, your spells are listed. There you will find the pronunciation of each spell. If you want to buy one, visit Rachel.
keywords.spell: Sorry, I only sell spells to druids.
keywords.crunor: Don't ask. They were only an unimportant footnote of history.
keywords.caress: Don't ask. They were only an unimportant footnote of history.
keywords.footnote: I have to attend other business, ask later please.

texts: Crunor's blessings. I am glad to see you again, !
Welcome to our humble guild, wanderer. May I be of any assistance to you?
I am the grand druid of Carlin. I am responsible for the guild, the fields, and our citizens health.

greetingPatterns.response: Crunor's blessings. I am glad to see you again, %N!
Crunor's blessings. I am glad to see you again, %N!
Welcome to our humble guild, wanderer. May I be of any assistance to you?
Welcome to our humble guild, wanderer. May I be of any assistance to you?

entries.response: I sell attack rune spells, healing rune spells, support rune spells and summon rune spells. Which of these interests you most?
I sell healing spells, supply spells, support spells and summon spells. Which of these interests you most?
For which level would you like to learn a spell?
Farewell.
For level 0 I have 'Food', 'Find Person' and 'Light'.
For level 1 I have 'Light Healing' and 'Light Magic Missile'.
For level 2 I have 'Antidote', 'Poison Field' and 'Intense Healing'.
For level 3 I have 'Great Light', 'Heavy Magic Missile' and 'Fire Field'.
For level 4 I have 'Magic Shield' and 'Intense Healing Rune'.
For level 5 I have 'Antidote Rune', 'Energy Field' and 'Fireball'.
For level 6 I have 'Destroy Field'.
For level 8 I have 'Ultimate Healing'.
For level 9 I have 'Great Fireball' and 'Firebomb'.
For level 10 I have 'Convince Creature' and 'Creature Illusion'.
For level 11 I have 'Ultimate Healing Rune', 'Poison Wall' and 'Chameleon'.
For level 12 I have 'Explosion'.
For level 13 I have 'Fire Wall'.
For level 15 I have 'Invisible'.
For level 16 I have 'Summon Creature'.
For level 18 I have 'Energy Wall'.
Sorry, I have only spells for magic level 0 to 6, 8 to 13, and from 15 to 18.
You already know how to cast this spell.
You have to be magic level %A to learn this spell.
Sorry, you do not have enough gold.
Here you are. Look in your spellbook for the pronunciation of this spell.
Maybe next time.
Thank you. Here it is.
Sorry, you do not have enough gold.
Maybe you will need it another time.
